title: Reminiscence Caves
description: The Reminiscence modpack focused on "Alex's Caves" mod.
body:
# The Reminiscence Caves

## What is this?

This modpack is intended for one of The Reminiscence events where you will play a short-lived minecraft server focused on the mod "[Alex's Caves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves)" (by sbom_xela). However we have decided to make it public so that everyone can enjoy a light modpack that emphasizes the "Alex's Caves" mod.

## Who are we?

The Reminiscence is a closed team dedicated to videogames (mainly minecraft). The administrators from time to time create experiences for our members, this is one of them.
